Open Application (m/f/x)

  • On-site, Remote
    • Berlin, Berlin, Germany
  • General

Job description

At DemoUp Cliplister, we’re revolutionizing how over 3,000 brands and retailers like MediaMarkt, Otto, Fnac, Microsoft, Logitech, and Bosch bring their products to life with innovative solutions like video, augmented reality, and user-generated content. Our unique approach combines content creation services with a state-of-the-art digital asset management platform and content syndication, making us a key SaaS player in Europe’s retail landscape. Join us to expand our network and make an impact!

Didn't find the right role among our current openings, but still think you'd be a great fit? We'd love to hear from you!

We're always looking for passionate, driven, and creative individuals to join our team. Whether your background is in Tech, HR, Sales, Marketing, Operations – or something else entirely – if you believe your experience and personality could make a difference here, feel free to apply!

Job requirements

What we’re looking for:

  • Relevant skills or experience in your area of interest

  • Passion for what you do

  • A collaborative mindset and sense of ownership

  • Curiosity and willingness to learn

The perks of working with us:

  • Subsidy for Urban Sport Club and Deutschland ticket

  • A dynamic and supportive work environment

  • Room for your ideas and personal growth

  • Flat hierarchy, flexible work models and modern tools

  • An international team and open communication culture

  • We offer a competitive salary, 30 days vacation, corporate benefits & more!
